steps.title: Identify the target temperature
steps.content: The butterfly can fly only when its body temperature is at least $56.0^\circ\text{F}$. Its current body temperature is $52.4^\circ\text{F}$.

steps.title: Subtract current temperature
steps.content: The minimum increase is the target temperature minus the current temperature: $$56.0-52.4=3.6$$ degrees Fahrenheit. The answer is B.
